use_cases: Displaying user profile pictures in applications and dashboards
Showing fallback initials when user images fail to load
Representing users in comments, posts, and social feeds
Creating team member or contact list displays
ai_summary: A lightweight avatar component from Base UI that displays user profile images within circular containers. Features a clean, minimalist design with automatic fallback to initials when images are unavailable or loading. Supports scalable sizing and integrates seamlessly into user-centric interfaces across any industry.
